_comment: Copy this file to deploy.local.json and set your Home Assistant www folder. deploy.local.json is gitignored. Alternatively set the HA_WWW_DEST env var. The path is the folder that will contain wall-clock-card.js, served by HA as /local/wall-clock-card/wall-clock-card.js.
_comment2: Optional: with haUrl + haToken (a long-lived access token from your HA profile), each deploy also bumps the ?v= cache-buster on the Lovelace resource via the HA WebSocket API (needs Node >= 22). resourceUrl overrides the resource path to bump (default /local/wall-clock-card/wall-clock-card.js).
